text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond is training hard, but I can't help
but feel that she's pushing herself too much to
break this jinx.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask Mejiro McQueen to join us for training, and
she happily accepts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While out for a jog, Satono Diamond buys herself
a drink that will supposedly help break her jinx
that prevents her from winning races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Mejiro McQueen points out that the
reason she's losing is because she is focusing on
the jinx when she ought to be focusing on her
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing this, Satono Diamond decides to
dedicate herself to improving her form.
